scores.reasoning: The homepage https://ads.google.com describes Google Ads as a platform to manage campaigns, ads, keywords, budgets, and reporting, consistent with the recorded description.
The auth page https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/rest/auth confirms OAuth2 as primary authorization and mentions developer tokens, matching the recorded value and note.

The developer token page https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api/docs/get-started/dev-token states developers can create OAuth2 credentials and test developer tokens without approval, with production tokens requiring review, matching the record.

The API overview https://developers.google.com/google-ads/api confirms the API offers gRPC as primary protocol with a limited REST interface, broad coverage of campaign, ad group, keyword, budget, bidding, and reporting objects, consistent with the record.

The evidence indicates test developer tokens and OAuth2 credentials can be obtained immediately for development, but production tokens require approval and review, matching the record's buildability note.
